goal: Compare Graph Neural Network (GNN) vs standard MLP for power allocation in a K-user interference channel. Generate synthetic channel data (Rayleigh fading, K=4-8 users). Train both models to maximize weighted sum-rate. Use 5000 training samples, 1000 test samples. Compare: sum-rate performance vs WMMSE algorithm baseline, inference time, generalization to unseen channel realizations. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456). Pure PyTorch, no HuggingFace.
